title: selago albomarginata
intro: Selago albomarginata, also known as white-edged selaginella, is a type of evergreen perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of southern Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selago albomarginata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
